title: stelis debilis
intro: Stelis debilis, also known as the "Weak Stelis," is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Stelis debilis include the potential treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a tonic to improve overall health. In herbal preparations, Stelis debilis is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
